docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARAN, NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STONE, DAVID $1,122.70 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,152.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT STONE, DAVID
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED MAY-05-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STONE, DAVID
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,122.70 FILED BY BARAN, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT STONE, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2015 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
